examples: If I win the game, I'd like one grain of rice for the first square of the chessboard, two for the second, four for the third, and then double the amount for each of the rest of the squares.
On the flyover near Balintawak station, I peer down at a chessboard of tin roofs.
They got out the chessboard and arranged the pieces.
And I will not allow middle class families to be treated like pawns on a chessboard.
Deep Blue was programmed to "see" the chessboard and to counter with the best move.
